'''Jode Tee''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was an agent serving in [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]]. As one of the guards covertly stationed aboard the passenger liner ''[[Queen of Empire]]'', he was tasked with watching over the defecting [[Yuuzhan Vong]] priestess [[Elan]] and her familiar [[Vergere]] to oversee their transfer from [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]] to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He was killed by [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] fire from [[Darda]] and [[Capo (Peace Brigade)|Capo]], members of the [[Peace Brigade]] who had infiltrated the NRI presence on the starliner.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}}
